state_pressure.basis: June 12 session overlay — SPX/10Y gap nearly closed; 10Y retreating; WTI at cycle low.

session_context: June 12 session overlay: neutral | stable; gap nearly closed; low confidence, fragile stability; WTI cycle low.

drafts.x:
Oil breaking lower while the rest of the board is watching.
Only matters if equities or yields confirms — and it hasn't yet.

SPX 7,389. 10Y 4.50%. Oil $86.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,500 or below 7,278
• 10Y moves beyond 4.70% or below 4.30%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Softening
CONFIDENCE: Low (35/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 12, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,388.94   z +0.77
  10Y Yield:      4.497%  z +0.91
  WTI Oil:        86.38   z -1.57

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,389 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.50% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $86 is pushing below its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. Confidence is low at 35/100 — the read is fragile and needs more signal before acting on it.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,500 or below 7,278
• 10Y moves beyond 4.70% or below 4.30%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 12, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — gap nearly closed, 10Y retreating, WTI at cycle low. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.10σ · nearly closed · WTI cycle low
analog_rows.outcome: Gap closed then resolved pro-risk — SPX reclaimed 1.0σ within 3 sessions as 10Y pulled back below 0.80σ and oil stayed suppressed

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.20σ · nearly closed · WTI cycle low
analog_rows.outcome: Gap closed then broke defensive — SPX lost 7,278 equivalent within 2 sessions as 10Y held above 0.90σ and oil continued lower

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.10σ · nearly closed · WTI cycle low
analog_rows.outcome: Neutral held — gap oscillated below 0.20σ for 4 sessions; neither gate cleared until 10Y re-tested 1.0σ and SPX broke 7,500 equivalent in week five

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. Nearly closed gap with WTI at cycle low is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,500 and 4.70%. Historical context.
